"use client"; // src/useSuspenseQuery.ts import { QueryObserver, skipToken } from "@tanstack/query-core"; import { useBaseQuery } from "./useBaseQuery.js"; import { defaultThrowOnError } from "./suspense.js"; function useSuspenseQuery(options, queryClient) { if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") { if (options.queryFn === skipToken) { console.error("skipToken is not allowed for useSuspenseQuery"); } } return useBaseQuery( { ...options, enabled: true, suspense: true, throwOnError: defaultThrowOnError, placeholderData: void 0 }, QueryObserver, queryClient ); } export { useSuspenseQuery }; //# sourceMappingURL=useSuspenseQuery.js.map
